name: KOSPI (Korea Composite Stock Index)
summary: Created 2026-05-12. **C4 KOSPI 7,855.47 MAY 13 (+2.8% 1D, +34.1% 1M, +42.6% 3M) — REBOUND AFTER MAY 12 -1.7% SELL-OFF. FM Cho Hyun's 'too early' on HMM Namu attribution + PPP opposition pressure DEFUSES immediate 'Korea forced to name Iran' diplomatic spiral. The 'double-tap drone' forensic confirmation is OPERATIONAL fact; the diplomatic implication is HEDGED. Korean helium-fab buffer ~4 weeks remains structural ceiling — Kornbluth 'tsunami a thousand miles offshore' thesis intact one more session. KOSPI -1.7% May 12 selloff in yesterday's brief is now BETTER-UNDERSTOOD AS PARTIAL REPRICING OF DIPLOMATIC-FRICTION RISK rather than definitive Iran-attribution event.** USD/KRW ₩1,489.12 (+1.0% 1D = DISCONNECT — currency says capital outflow, equity says relief). If both reverse together, regime change. **Asia split: KOSPI +2.8% relief vs SMH -2.6% / TAIEX -1.3% (semis cooled on AI-megacap profit-take, rotation into industrial-cyclicals Cu +2.5%).** Crisis-linked share: ~35% (relief), ~65% AI semis bid. Brent retrace + Trump-Xi summit-trade hopes = Asia ex-China-Japan reflation bid; KOSPI gets cleanest relief. **Watch USD/KRW: if both KOSPI bounce AND USD/KRW reverse together, regime change. Iran-named-attribution within 14 days would reprice helium tail risk in a hurry.** Reversibility: KOSPI bounce reverses on Iran-named-attribution; SMH unwind reverses on AI-capex catalyst return (NVIDIA earnings May 28). ORIGINAL CONTEXT (May 12): KOSPI is primary Korean equity benchmark; persistent index for Korean memory-fab + AI-semis + helium cascade. **KOSPI 7,690.59 May 12 (-1.7% 1D — first profit-taking session of cycle; +33.1% 1M / +39.3% 3M / +78% YTD into May 11).** The largest 30-day move in any major-market index in recent memory. **Crisis-linked cascade path: war → Qatar Ras Laffan offline → helium constraint → 4-week countdown to Korean fab buffer exhaustion (mid-June) → Samsung/SK Hynix production-halt risk.** **B9 HMM Namu forensics public May 11: Korean joint investigation confirmed strike by 2 unidentified aerial objects ~1 min apart at stern; mine + torpedo RULED OUT; SEOUL STOPPED SHORT OF PUBLICLY BLAMING IRAN — creating diplomatic friction with Trump.** Korea has gone from 'passive helium victim' to 'active diplomatic actor.' USD/KRW ₩1,488.28 (+1.9% 1D) on Korea-Iran-attribution friction + capital outflow. Crisis-linked share: ~40% (helium tail + HMM Namu + diplomatic friction); secular ~60% (AI capex super-cycle dominating Samsung +111% YTD / SK Hynix +144% YTD). **STILL MOST REVERSIBLE POSITION IN WORLD if helium buffers deplete past mid-June.** Watch level: KOSPI 7,500 hold within 5 sessions confirms Korea AI-bid intact despite diplomatic friction.

active_triggers.condition: KOSPI breaks below 7,500 sustained 3 sessions — confirms AI-bid cracking under diplomatic friction
Samsung or SK hynix announces production halt due to helium shortage by mid-June
active_triggers.note: Inherits from helium node — most time-sensitive trigger in graph; ~4 weeks remaining.

'Double-tap drone' forensic confirmation is OPERATIONAL fact; diplomatic implication is HEDGED. Korean helium-fab buffer ~4 weeks remains structural ceiling. recent_signals.verification: KOSPI +2.8% 1D = CONFIRMED tape; HMM Namu external strike + FM Cho 'too early' = CONFIRMED (Seoul official briefing + Korea Herald primary); PPP opposition pressure = CONFIRMED (Korean political reporting).

recent_signals.headline: KOSPI -1.7% 1D = FIRST PROFIT-TAKING SESSION OF CYCLE after extraordinary +33.1% 1M / +39.3% 3M / +78% YTD into May 11 — largest 30-day move in any major-market index in recent memory. Drivers: (1) HMM Namu forensics public May 11 — Seoul stopped short of publicly blaming Iran, creating diplomatic friction with Trump; (2) USD/KRW ₩1,488.28 +1.9% 1D on capital outflow; (3) mechanical profit-taking in a vertical market. Korea has gone from passive helium victim to active diplomatic actor. SMH $576.31 +1.7% 1D / +31.9% 1M; AI infrastructure CapEx demand from Microsoft/Meta/Amazon unbroken. Helium tail-risk timeline: Korean fab buffer ~4 weeks remaining to mid-June exhaustion. Tier-1 chipmaker production-halt falsification still HOLDS but window contracting.
sources: Seoul official briefing + Bloomberg + Insurance Journal + Korea Herald (HMM Namu forensics)
